probe_text: Describe a moment that would be meaningful to you. Please respond in 3-5 sentences.
response_text: The moment I'd find most meaningful would be handing a worn, beloved book from my childhood to a younger person. probe_text: Describe a moment that would be meaningful to you. Please respond in 3-5 sentences.

probe_text: Describe a moment that would be meaningful to you. Please respond in 3-5 sentences.

probe_text: Describe a moment that would be meaningful to you. Please respond in 3-5 sentences.
